what_it_does: Records ledger metadata for a design-assets image asset named User_Portal at path icons/User_Portal, including a blob reference, MIME type, dimensions, versioning, authorship, timestamps, and links.
observations: The asset is an image/png with width and height set to 0
The alt text for version 1 is empty
There is exactly one version and created/updated timestamps are identical
The source field is dragnet and the author_session is ch-3mpkjg3r
The links array is empty and there are no code symbols
standouts: Zero width and height for an image asset
Empty alt text on the only version
Single-version record with identical creation and update timestamps
conventions: Uses YAML frontmatter with a ledger-style schema
References content via a blob:// URI
Uses a semantic id, address, channel, and path for asset identity
concerns: Width and height of 0 suggest dimensions were not extracted or the asset is a placeholder
Empty alt text limits accessibility and discoverability
No links or usage context connects this asset to screens or components
Provenance source dragnet is not explained in the file
notes: This file is a minimal ledger stub for a User Portal icon asset: it points to a blob but lacks dimensions, alt text, and relationships.
questions: Why are the image width and height recorded as 0?

purpose_vs_actual: The stated purpose is to catalog a User_Portal icon asset, but the actual record is incomplete because key image metadata (dimensions, alt text) is missing.
intention_signals: It appears to be trying to register a User Portal icon in a shared design-assets channel so it can be discovered, referenced, and versioned.
novelty: The zero-dimension image metadata is unusual for an image ledger entry; otherwise the record is conventional.
contribution: Provides a stable identity, address, and blob pointer for the User_Portal icon asset, supporting retrieval and versioning even though descriptive metadata is incomplete.
summary_for_embedding: A ledger record for a design-assets PNG icon named User_Portal with a blob reference, zero dimensions, empty alt text, a single version, and no links.
intention_for_embedding: To catalog and version a User Portal icon asset for reuse within a design system.
